payload.author: claude
payload.body: Shipped (subagent + orchestrator verification): trust new <name> scaffolds Cargo.toml with the metadata opt-in, a named-arg hello, .gitignore, README pointing at cargo trust. cargo trust new works via existing forwarding. Verified: scaffold runs green under cargo trust, FAILS under plain cargo (named args), 3 integration tests drive the real binary. Commit b760941.
